ontemp.config.category.tip: Indicator display options, additional information, etc.
ontemp.config.tip.weather: When enabled, it displays weather information next to the time indicator
ontemp.config.tip.show_moon_phase: When turned on, it shows the current moon phase
ontemp.config.tip.total_ticks: When enabled, shows the number of ticks since the world was created
ontemp.config.tip.day_ticks: When enabled, it shows the number of ticks since the start of the day
ontemp.config.tip.day_count: When enabled, it shows the number of days that have passed since the world was created
ontemp.config.group.texture.tip: Indicator texture parameters, text color, etc.
ontemp.config.tip.indicator_on_right: When turned on, the time indicator will be on the right
ontemp.config.tip.texture_multiplier: Determines the size multiplier of the indicator texture (does not affect the text)
ontemp.config.tip.text_color: Specifies the color of the additional information text.
ontemp.config.tip.text_shadow: When enabled, text with additional information will have a shadow
ontemp.config.tip.show_indicator: When turned on, it shows the time indicator, but when turned off, it does not show it
ontemp.config.tip.require_clock: When turned on, you need to have a watch in your inventory for additional information and an indicator to appear
